title: SMISMEMBER
description: Determines whether multiple members belong to a set.
complexity: O(N) where N is the number of elements being checked for membership

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Returns whether each `member` is a member of the set stored at `key`. For every `member`, `1` is returned if the value is a member of the set, or `0` if the element is not a member of the set or if `key` does not exist. ## Examples SADD myset "one" SADD myset "one" SMISMEMBER myset "one" "notamember" ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list representing the membership of the given elements, in the same order as they are requested. **RESP3:** [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list representing the membership of the given elements, in the same order as they are requested.
intro:
Returns whether each `member` is a member of the set stored at `key`.

For every `member`, `1` is returned if the value is a member of the set, or `0` if the element is not a member of the set or if `key` does not exist.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
Returns whether each `member` is a member of the set stored at `key`.

For every `member`, `1` is returned if the value is a member of the set, or `0` if the element is not a member of the set or if `key` does not exist.

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
SADD myset "one"
SADD myset "one"
SMISMEMBER myset "one" "notamember"

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list representing the membership of the given elements, in the same order as they are requested.

**RESP3:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list representing the membership of the given elements, in the same order as they are requested.
